license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bxq5pmy6
title: Statistical analysis
author: Chunmei Chang

steps_raw.instruction: Perform statistical analysis with GraphPad Prism 9.
Analyze the data of bead-based binding assay by one-way ANOVA with Dunn’s multiple comparisons test.
Analyze the data of ULK1 kinase activity assay by two-way ANOVA with Šídák's multiple comparisons test.
